feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Joule for developers ABAP AI capability ltd promotion
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support

Regarding the SAP cloud service "Joule for developers ABAP AI capability Ltd promotion" (contract attached), how do we enable the subscription service for SAP Private Cloud S/4HANA 2023 version FSP03?

Best Regards,

TCCI

Owen Wang

entry.title: Display Hierarchy in SAP RAP
entry.content:
ABAP Development  ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model  #ABAPCloud

We are trying to create a UI app with

1. WBS hierarchy tree on first page.

2. On click of a selected WBS it would go to another page which has financial details in form of single table having multiple tab views.

Can anyone please help with any of these requirements? How can we use analytical cube and query to achieve this?

entry.title: How to access custom VBAK fields in BAPI_SALESORDER_CHANGE?
entry.content:
I created custom VBAK fields in Custom Fields app. Now, I'm trying to access it on BAPI_SALESORDER_CHANGE to manipulate its values.
Is this possible?

Is it not present in BAPE_VBAK.

entry.title: Get BUT000 data in BDT Event DSAVB
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm using the Business Data Toolset (BDT) for BP to set a specific value in one field of BUT000 table when a specific BP Grouping is used.
I implemented this logic in a custom function module and linked it to the event DSAVB.
Because the function module is not included into the standard environment I need to read the current BUT000 work area.
I tried to use the function BUP_BUPA_BUT000_GET, but its usage generates an infinite loop, because it, in turns , calls the event DSAVB.
I know that there is still the old fashioned way to pull the BUT000 value looking at the calling stack level, but I'm wondering if there is a more modern way to accomplish the task.

Thanks,
Antonino

entry.title: Extensibility of Manage Prices - Sales (F4111) : Change Standard Field Logic
entry.content:
Hello Folks,

As my current Project Requirement, they are asking to change Standard fields logic in Manage Prices - Sales (F4111) application.

By Default, "Price Group" is coming wth pre-populated values. As per business requirement, they are asking to make this field as BLANK at initial load and fill values using Custom Code when we hit on SAVE button. 

1) Make "Price Group" as Blank.
I believe this can be manageable via configuration, but let me know if there is any other best practice.

2) Replace "Price Group" value with custom logic.

Please check attached screenshot for your reference.

Can we change standard app existing fields logic? IS THIS POSSIBLE AT All?

As per my understanding and findings, via UI ADAPTATION, we can only add NEW CUSTOM Fields in this application and make our custom code on newly added Custom field only SAP NOTE reference- https://me.sap.com/notes/3261750/E.

If we are going to touch standard code, we are going to break the chain of CLEAN CORE approach, and that will be replaced in future upgrade also.

Please suggest.

entry.title: CL_SALV_BS_RUNTIME_INFO returns empty data after upgrade to S/4HANA 2025
entry.content:
Description:
After upgrading S/4HANA On-Premise from 1809 to 2025, part of our custom code no longer works.

We are using CL_SALV_BS_RUNTIME_INFO to capture ALV output from a standard report. The logic worked correctly in 1809.

Simplified code:

cl_salv_bs_runtime_info=>set(
display = abap_false
metadata = abap_false
data = abap_true ).

SUBMIT fagl_line_item_browser
VIA SELECTION-SCREEN
AND RETURN.

TRY.
cl_salv_bs_runtime_info=>get_data_ref(
IMPORTING r_data = lt_data_ref ).
CATCH cx_salv_bs_sc_runtime_info.
MESSAGE 'Error when receiving data.' TYPE 'E'.
ENDTRY.

After the upgrade, lt_data_ref is always initial (empty), although the report itself displays data correctly when executed normally.

It seems that FAGL_LINE_ITEM_BROWSER might now be using ALV with IDA (HANA-based rendering) instead of classical SALV, which could explain why CL_SALV_BS_RUNTIME_INFO no longer captures the output data.

Has the behavior of CL_SALV_BS_RUNTIME_INFO changed in S/4HANA 2025, or is there a recommended alternative approach to retrieve ALV data from FAGL_LINE_ITEM_BROWSER in this case?

entry.title: S_ALR_87013336 dumps with SQL parser error after upgrade to S/4HANA 2025
entry.content:
After upgrading S/4HANA On-Premise from 1809 to 2025, the standard report S_ALR_87013336 produces an SQL error at runtime.

Error message:
“SQL Error: The parser produced the error: The elements in the …”
(Message No. GU016)

The report was working correctly before the upgrade (in 1809) and no custom modifications were made.

Is this a known issue with S_ALR_87013336 after upgrading to S/4HANA 2025?
Are there any SAP Notes or recommended corrections (e.g., regeneration of report groups or fixes in Report Painter/Writer)?

entry.title: Field values not visible for Custom Fields added in Standard Fiori App Manage Customer Line Item
entry.content:
Hi,

We have a standard Fiori Application 'Manage Customer Line Items' in which few custom fields were already added into it and app was working fine in the Production system.

Now, we have a new requirement to add one more custom field into the App. We did this by adding a new field into an extended  CDS view which is basically an extention of  standard CDS I_ARLINEITEM (as all the other custom fields added in the past, were also added into this extended CDS view only). And this standard CDS view is binded to the Entityset inside a method (IF_SADL_GW_DPC_UTIL~GET_DPC) in DPC_EXT Class  of an extended OData. Now the Fiori app was working fine in TEST and Pre-Production system i.e. newly added custom field is visible in the List Report and value also getting populated into it.

But when we have moved the changes to Production system, then there, new custom field is visible but its not containing any value. Although, in the standard CDS view I_ARLINEITEM, value is there but its not getting visible into the Fiori App inside that new field. When we checked the response in the inspect(F12) then there also new field is not carrying any value. Also, when we checked the GET call in GW Client in SAP GUI for the ITEM Entityset then there also value is not coming inside the custom field.

Kindly guide.

Thanks.

entry.title: Sales order item plant re-determination and pricing routine
entry.content:
Hello experts,

In sales order processing, I have the requirement to do custom plant determination for parent items based on the total quantity of all parent items compared with a threshold value defined in a custom table. If the total quantity of parent items is less than the threshold value (in the defined UoM) then the plant of all items is changed to the plant defined for the order customer in another custom table. In parallel, I want a custom condition ZTR0 to be active for all items having a plant stored in another custom table.

For the pricing, I implemented a routine KOBED_XXX which was generated automatically.

User-exits I am using include

  • MV45AFZZ, sub-routine userexit_move_field_to_vbap and
  • MV45AFZB, sub-routine userexit_check_vbap 

I use MV45AFZZ for plant re-determination of a single item and then MV45AFZB for more than one item and quantity total calculation.

However, if plant is re-determined for all items then the condition ZTR0 is not activated apart from the first item. For the other items, in Analysis button it shows the message "Condition record exists, but has not been set"

Can somebody help?

Regards,

Konstantinos

entry.title: 클라우드 활성판매이나 온프레미스 활성판매 탭에 활성화
entry.content:
2985058 : Uyemura Korea Co., Ltd. /  2998743 : Koa Automotive Co., Ltd.

위 2건에 대해 클라우드 활성판매이나 온프레미스 활성판매 탭에 활성화 되어있어 수정요청 드립니다.
(SAP For ME 이슈로 시스템문제는 아님)

entry.title: How to strikeout the Po line item in adobe forms
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have a requirement to strike out deleted PO line items in SAP Adobe Forms. Specifically, I need to display a strikethrough format for line items that have been marked as deleted. In JavaScript (Initilalize) I wrote the logic like attached screenshot. but it does not work. Kindly help me.

 

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: ABAP XFT - Upload PDF to File Node
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I am currently working on an ABAP requirement where I need to programmatically attach a generated PDF document to an XFT node of type File.

Current implementation status:

  1. I generate the form output from SmartForms and receive the OTF data.
  2. I convert the OTF output into PDF format (XSTRING).
  3. I already have the header / identification data of the target XFT node.

My issue is with the final step: I am unable to find the correct standard function module, class, or API to attach the PDF binary content (XSTRING) to the XFT file node.

I have already explored standard document-related classes and function modules, but so far I haven't identified the correct XFT API.

Questions:

  • Is there a standard class or function module for uploading content into an XFT file node?
  • Is there any recommended approach or framework for this scenario?
  • Has anyone implemented something similar in ECC or S/4HANA?

Any guidance, examples, or pointers would be highly appreciated.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: S/4HANA Public Cloud: Cannot Transport Existing Custom Field Changes
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I’m facing an issue while transporting a custom field from the Dev tenant to the QA tenant in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud (release 2602).

I went through multiple blogs and found that the recommended approach is to use the Export Software Collection app. I do have access to the app, but I’m unable to see the field I modified.

In my case, the field already existed I only changed its length and republished it. However, this change is not appearing in the software collection, so I’m unable to transport it.

 

Has anyone encountered a similar issue or can suggest what might be missing here?

 

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: SAP Beginner
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm currently working as ERP consultant with scripting, customization and API integrations, and now I want to move completely into SAP development 
I would like guidance on how to start my SAP learning journey and which path would be best for becoming an SAP developer with Data and AI (Hybrid role). 

I'd really appreciate any roadmaps suggestions or advice from experienced professionals. 
 I have student subscription, I also want to understand how to use it effectively for hands on practice and real project learning.

entry.title: ABAP Objects: How to Properly Reset an Instance to Its Initial State
entry.content:
Hi everyone,
Enjoying my weekend coffee ☕️ and reflecting on a tricky debugging session I had this week. I spent 2 days chasing a bug related to object state, so today I want to share a quick tip on resetting an instance to its initial state in ABAP Objects.
The Solution:
To clear an object and free up memory, the simplest way is using the free() method.
Example:
lo_object_instance->free( ).
Why it matters:
In my case, the object was retaining old data from previous loops, leading to unexpected behavior. By explicitly calling free(), I ensured the instance was cleared before being reused or re-initialized.
It was a tough 2-day debug, but a great lesson learned!
Have a great weekend and happy coding! 💻

entry.title: activated MM_PUR_PURCHORD_REWORK_WFL in client-000 but it is not active in client-100
entry.content:
Hello SAP,

In client-000, we opened the client via SCC4 and SE06, then using transaction SFW5 we successfully activated MM_PUR_PURCHORD_REWORK_WFL in client-000. We don't see this function set activated in client-100. Shouldn't this activation be client independent? Can you please advice. 

Thanks,

Gus

entry.title: How to use BAPE_SDSALESDOCITEM to update custom VBAP fields?
entry.content:
Goal: Update the sales order from the reference document when reference document is updated.
Context: Sales Order is created using "Create with reference". Tried to debug this an found no error but I think I was not mapping it to proper line item. 

Additionally, the values of IT_CONTRACT_VBAP comes from other METHOD that select custom fields from VBAP.

This the how the BUILD_ITEM_EXTENSION is called:

BUILD_ITEM_EXTENSION(
EXPORTING
IV_SO_VBELN = IV_SO_VBELN
IV_CONTRACT_VBELN = IV_CONTRACT_VBELN
IV_CONTRACT_VBAP = IT_CONTRACT_VBAP
IMPORTING
ET_EXTENSION = LT_ITEM_EXT ).

DATA: lo_bapi_mapping TYPE REF TO if_cfd_bapi_mapping.

TYPES BEGIN OF ty_so_ref, vgbel TYPE vbap-vgbel, vgpos TYPE vbap-vgpos, posnr TYPE vbap-posnr, END OF ty_so_ref.

DATA lt_so_ref TYPE HASHED TABLE OF ty_so_ref WITH UNIQUE KEY vgbel vgpos.

CLEAR: et_extensionin.

SELECT vgbel, vgpos, posnr FROM VBAP WHERE VBELN = _so_vbeln AND uepos =  AND vgbel <>  AND vgpos <>  INTO TABLE (lt_so_vbap).

LOOP AT LT_SO_VBAP ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<LFS_SO_VBAP>).
 INSERT VALUE ty_so_ref( vgbel = <lfs_so_vbap>-vgbel vgpos = <lfs_so_vbap>-vgpos posnr = <lfs_so_vbap>-posnr ) INTO TABLE lt_so_ref. ENDLOOP.

lo_bapi_mapping = cl_fd_bapi_mapping=>get_instance( ).

LOOP AT it_contract_vbap ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<lfs_contract_item>).

DATA(lv_contract_vbeln) = <lfs_contract_item>-vbeln.
DATA(lv_contract_posnr) = CONV vbap-vgpos( |{ <lfs_contract_item>-posnr ALPHA = IN } | ).

TRY.
 DATA(ls_so_ref) = lt_so_ref[ vgbel = lv_contrat_vbeln vgpos = lv_contract_posnr ].
 CATCH cx_sy_itab_line_not_found.
  CONTINUE.
ENDTRY.
ENDLOOP.

DATA(ls_item_ext) = VALUE bape_sdsalesdocitem( 
 key = CONV sdsalesdoc_key( iv_so_vbeln )
).

ls_item_ext-data-z_field_A = <lfs_contract_item>-z_field_A.
ls_item_ext-data-z_field_B = <lfs_contract_item>-z_field_B.

ls_item_ext-datax-z_field_A_ = abap_true.
ls_item_ext-datax-z_field_B = abap_true.

TRY.
 lo_bapi_mapping->map_to_bapiparex_single(
 EXPORTING
  ir_source_structure = REF #( ls_item_ext )
 CHANGING
  ct_bapiparex = et_extensionin
 CATCH cx_cfd_bapi_mapping.
  CONTINUE.
 ENDTRY.
ENDLOOP.

entry.title: ADT Keyword Highlights Are (STILL) Broken
entry.content:
Hello all,

my previous post from Apr 01 2025 discussed the absolutely broken syntax highlighting in ADT.

Since then, there were zero improvements and highlights still remain broken.

As you can see in the screenshot below, the keyword "LOCK" is not colored correctly, while every other keyword is.

This happens to MANY keywords, as if ABAP was extended, but not the highlighter. Also sometimes, keywords change color when the cursor position changes, but then changes back once you use the scroll wheel to refresh the view without changing the position of the cursor. In my previous post are more examples.

In all honestly, this is unacceptable, as if the developers who develop ADT either don't use it or are not human all together.

entry.title: CPCC_S_TASK_LIST_MAINTAIN assign component error
entry.content:
Hi experts，

When I use the function CPCC_S_TASK_LIST_MAINTAIN to assign components to a routing, I get the following error:
"Object to be processed could not be uniquely determined."
My BOM components have been modified with an ECN, and the parameters I passed are correct. Has anyone encountered this situation before?
Here is my code,someone can help me ?

  LOOP AT lt_line ASSIGNING <ls_line>.
    CLEAR:lv_datuv,lt_idnrk[].
    lv_datuv = <ls_line>-datuv.
    CALL FUNCTION 'CSAP_MAT_BOM_READ'
      EXPORTING
        material    = <ls_line>-matnr
        plant       = <ls_line>-werks
        bom_usage   = '1'
        alternative = <ls_line>-stlal
        valid_from  = lv_datuv
      TABLES
        t_stpo      = lt_idnrk
      EXCEPTIONS
        error       = 1
        OTHERS      = 2.
    CLEAR:lv_idnrk.
    lv_idnrk = <ls_line>-idnrk.
    lv_idnrk = |{ lv_idnrk ALPHA = OUT }|.
    LOOP AT lt_idnrk ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<ls_idnrk>) WHERE COMPONENT = lv_idnrk AND ITEM_NO = <ls_line>-posnr.

      ls_comp-maintain_mode        = 'C'.
      ls_comp-flag_bar_pointer = '0000000001'.
      ls_comp-sequence_no          = '000000'.
      ls_comp-activity             = <ls_line>-vornr.

      ls_comp-bom_type             = 'M'.
      ls_comp-bom_type_root        = 'M'.
      ls_comp-bom_no               = <ls_idnrk>-BOM_NO.
      ls_comp-bom_no_root          = <ls_idnrk>-BOM_NO.
      ls_comp-alternative_bom      = <ls_line>-stlal.
      ls_comp-alternative_bom_root = <ls_line>-stlal.
      ls_comp-item_id              = <ls_idnrk>-ITEM_NODE.
      ls_comp-item_no              = <ls_idnrk>-ITEM_no.
      ls_comp-plant                = <ls_line>-werks.
      ls_comp-material             = <ls_line>-matnr.
      READ TABLE lt_marc TRANSPORTING NO FIELDS WITH KEY idnrk = <ls_line>-idnrk BINARY SEARCH.
      IF sy-subrc = 0 OR <ls_idnrk>-spproctype = '50'.
         ls_comp-order_lvl = '01'.
         ls_comp-order_path = '01'.
         ls_compx-order_lvl = 'X'.
         ls_compx-order_path = 'X'.
      ENDIF.
      ls_compx-sequence_no          = 'X'.
      ls_compx-activity             = 'X'.
      ls_compx-plant                = 'X'.
      ls_compx-material             = 'X'.
      ls_compx-alternative_bom_root = 'X'.
      ls_compx-bom_type_root        = 'X'.
      ls_compx-bom_no_root          = 'X'.

      APPEND ls_comp TO lt_comp.
      APPEND ls_compx TO lt_compx.
      CLEAR:ls_comp,ls_compx.

    ENDLOOP.

  ENDLOOP.

*  DATA:LV_MODE TYPE C VALUE 'C'.
  CALL FUNCTION 'CPCC_S_TASK_LIST_MAINTAIN'
    EXPORTING
      key_date                = lv_key_date
      task_list_type          = 'N'
      task_list_group         = lv_task_list_group
*     TASK_MAINTAIN_MODE      = LV_MODE
      group_counter           = lv_group_counter
      application             = 'PP01'
      bom_usage               = lv_bom_usage
      material                = lv_material  
      plant                   = lv_plant  
    TABLES
      component_allocations   = lt_comp
      component_allocations_x = lt_compx
      return                  = lt_return.

entry.title: PPCI - Error when creating custom OM infotype
entry.content:
Hi,

I have done this so many times but somehow cannot get PPCI to create a custom OM Infotype. I am following the correct steps in creating a new custom OM Infotype but fail to PPCI to create the infotype. I keep on getting an error that "Structure HRI9106 exists" and "R3TR TABL HRI9106 exists" which does not make sense as the structure is required to generate the Infotype. Before i started I made sure that there are no entries in  T778T, T777D, and T777Z and not other structures or programs relating to that Infotype. I have tried using a random high 9 number as well, and it still gives the same error.

https://getsapdone.wordpress.com/2020/06/14/how-to-create-sap-om-infotype/

What am I missing?

Kind Regards

Deon
